zh.lifeSummary: 當Hermann von Froburg於1129年出生在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 萊格可萊斯 蓋塔福洛賀包格時，他的父親Graf Hermann von Frohburg I34歲，母親Countess Of Frohburg35歲。他於大約1184年與Tochter von Kyburg結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1211年在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 萊格可萊斯 波納福洛賀包格享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Froburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eward, Kurt.  Scandinavian Nils, Sven.

Swedish (Fröberg): habitational name from any of several places in Sweden named Fröberga, from frö ‘fertile, rich’, or from the name of the Nordic goddess Fröja, + berg ‘mountain, hill’; or possibly an ornamental name composed of the same elements.
Danish (Frøberg): habitational name from a place called Frøbjerg.

nameMeanings.name: Hermann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hermann von Froburg was born in 1129, in Frohburg, Kreis Geithain, Leipzig, East Germany, his father, Graf Hermann von Frohburg I, was 34 and his mother, Countess Of Frohburg, was 35. He married Tochter von Kyburg about 1184. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1211, in Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Leipzig, East Germany, at the age of 82.

fr.Frohburg, Borna, Leipzig, Saxony, German: Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Bezirk Leipzig, Allemagne de l'Est
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hermann von Froburg est né en 1129, à Frohburg, Kreis Geithain, Bezirk Leipzig, Allemagne de l'Est, son père, Graf Hermann von Frohburg I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Countess Of Frohburg, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Tochter von Kyburg environ 1184. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1211, à Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Bezirk Leipzig, Allemagne de l'Est, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.Frohburg, Borna, Leipzig, Saxony, German: Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Bezirk Leipzig, Deutsche Demokratische Republik
de.lifeSummary: Als Hermann von Froburg 1129 in Frohburg, Kreis Geithain, Bezirk Leipzig, Deutsche Demokratische Republik geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Hermann von Frohburg I 34 und seine Mutter Countess Of Frohburg 35. Er hat um 1184 Tochter von Kyburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1211 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Bezirk Leipzig, Deutsche Demokratische Republik.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann von Froburg è nato il nel 1129 nel Frohburg, Kreis Geithain, Bezirk Leipzig, Germania Est, il suo padre, Graf Hermann von Frohburg I, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Countess Of Frohburg, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Tochter von Kyburg circa 1184. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1211, nel Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Bezirk Leipzig, Germania Est, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hermann von Froburgが1129年に東德ベズイルク レイプズイグクレイス ジェイサインフロhブルグで生まれた時，父Graf Hermann von Frohburg Iは34歳，母Countess Of Frohburgは35歳であった。約1184年にTochter von Kyburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1211年に東德ベズイルク レイプズイグクレイス ボルナフロhブルグで82歳で死去した。

ko.Frohburg, Borna, Leipzig, Saxony, German: 동독 베지르크 레이p지그 크레이스 본아 프로h버그
ko.lifeSummary: Hermann von Froburg(이)가 1129년 동독 베지르크 레이p지그 크레이스 그이스언 프로h버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Hermann von Frohburg I(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Of Frohburg(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1184년 Tochter von Kyburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1211년 동독 베지르크 레이p지그 크레이스 본아 프로h버그에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann von Froburg nasceu em 1129, em Frohburg, Kreis Geithain, Bezirk Leipzig, Deutsche Demokratische Republik, seu pai, Graf Hermann von Frohburg I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Countess Of Frohburg, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Tochter von Kyburg aproximadamente 1184. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1211, em Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Bezirk Leipzig, Deutsche Demokratische Republik, com 82 anos.

ru.Frohburg, Borna, Leipzig, Saxony, German: фрохбург, крис борна, безирк липзиг, Восточная Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hermann von Froburg родился в 1129 г. в местности фрохбург, крис джитан, безирк липзиг, Восточная Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Hermann von Frohburg I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Countess Of Frohburg, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Tochter von Kyburg около 1184 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1211 г. в местности фрохбург, крис борна, безирк липзиг, Восточная Германия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hermann von Froburg nació en 1129, en Frohburg, Kreis Geithain, Bezirk Leipzig, Alemania Oriental, su papá, Graf Hermann von Frohburg I, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Countess Of Frohburg, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Tochter von Kyburg aproximadamente 1184. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1211, en Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Bezirk Leipzig, Alemania Oriental, a la edad de 82 años.
